ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance event */,
  "flags" INTEGER /* Flags associated with the event */,
  "source_locator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the source locator */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the correlation of events */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the function executed */,
  "executed" INTEGER /* Number of times the function was executed */,
  "pc_offset" INTEGER /* Program counter offset */,
  "threads_executed" INTEGER /* Number of threads executed */,
  "l2_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of Level 2 transactions */,
  "theoretical_l2_transactions" INTEGER /* Theoretical number of Level 2 transactions */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_events_correlation_id FOREIGN KEY ("correlation_id") REFERENCES correlation_ids ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_events_source_locator_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_locator_id") REFERENCES source_locators ("source_locator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_events_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_locators" (
  "source_locator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source locator */,
  "source_locator_name" TEXT /* Name of the source locator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source locator */,
  "locator_type" TEXT /* Type of the source locator (e.g., server, application, service) */,
  "locator_address" TEXT /* IP address or URL of the source locator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_locator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "function_category" TEXT /* Category of the function (e.g., database, API, file system) */,
  "function_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the function within a category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_ids" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation ID */,
  "correlation_name" TEXT /* Name of the correlation ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation ID */,
  "correlation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the correlation ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated performance event */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., milliseconds, bytes, percentage) */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric to trigger alerts or notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES performance_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the system component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the system component (e.g., hardware, software, network) */,
  "component_version" TEXT /* Version number of the system component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_components" (
  "event_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-component mapping */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system component */,
  "component_role" TEXT /* Role of the system component in the event (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES system_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_components_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES performance_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, developer) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance event accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser and version used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES performance_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
